title: salix iseriensis
intro: Salix iseriensis, also known as the Iserian willow, is a species of willow tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix iseriensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Salix iseriensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for various health applications.
